Accommodations

Rooms & Suites

Six categories, each holding a different distance from the water — from open-sky private pools to beach-view balconies.

Signature Suite

Open to Sky Private Pool

Modern and spacious, with a king-size bed, an exquisite sea view, and a Bali-style bathroom — and at its heart, a private plunge pool with nothing but sky for a ceiling. Swim at noon, swim at midnight; the room keeps no hours but yours.

Pool Suite

Close to Sky Private Pool

Perfect for longer stays — a living room, a dedicated study area, and upgraded amenities wrapped around your own sheltered private pool. Total privacy, start to finish.
